title: potamogeton alpinus subvar. iteratus
intro: Potamogeton alpinus subvar. iteratus, also known as a variant of the Alpine Pondweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Potamogetonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Potamogeton alpinus subvar. iteratus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, salves, and tinctures.
